notes: pysystemtrade asset-class trend. EA runs one instance per registered host symbol; each instance trends the cross-sectional median vol-normalised return of the host's asset CLASS (forex / index / metals+commodities), reading the foreign .DWX class members on D1. Class membership is resolved in-EA; this manifest lists the read universe so the factory pre-selects the symbols. Foreign reads bound at call site via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory; one position per magic on the host. SP500.DWX is a backtest-only read member (never a live-routed host). All listed symbols verified present in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
